reasoning: The control CM-6(1) focuses on automated management, application, and verification of configuration settings. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that configuration management tools (like GitOps or configuration management systems) are integrated to manage and verify configurations. Admission controllers can be used to enforce and verify configurations at deployment time. Additionally, tools that detect configuration drift can help ensure that configurations remain compliant over time.
